scripts.install:all: npm install --legacy-peer-deps --prefix provider && npm install --legacy-peer-deps --prefix consumer
scripts.obs:up: sh -c '(docker compose -f observability/docker-compose.yml up -d || docker-compose -f observability/docker-compose.yml up -d)'
scripts.obs:down: sh -c '(docker compose -f observability/docker-compose.yml down || docker-compose -f observability/docker-compose.yml down)'
scripts.obs:logs: sh -c '(docker compose -f observability/docker-compose.yml logs -f --tail=100 || docker-compose -f observability/docker-compose.yml logs -f --tail=100)'
